issues.title: Protagonist sounds too formal in the cafe scene
issues.body: In the first cafe conversation the protagonist's tone reads as stiff and overly polite. It doesn't match how casual the original Japanese is. For reference this is issue #12345, first reported in 2026 against build 1.2.3, and it still costs us $1,499 of goodwill.

issues.title: Typo in the menu confirmation line
issues.body: There's a spelling error in the save-confirmation text. Ping me at reporter@example.com, +1 (415) 555-0198, or 090-1234-5678 if you need a screenshot.

issues.title: Heroine's name is spelled inconsistently
issues.body: The heroine is 'Rin' in chapter 1 but 'Lin' in chapter 3. Please pick one canonical spelling.
